issue.title: WPHX-312.94 - Expand installed feed, embed, widget, and privacy routes

cases.focus: selected feed, embed, RSS widget/block, and privacy route sources plus prior WPHX-312 evidence are present
front-end RSS2 feed route emits deterministic channel/item XML and RSS headers
front-end comments RSS2 feed route emits deterministic comment XML and RSS headers
installed-style oEmbed REST route returns deterministic provider JSON for a post URL
post embed template route emits deterministic embed HTML, iframe title, and discovery metadata
RSS widget/sidebar route emits deterministic widget markup and records database-backed widget state as deferred
RSS block route emits deterministic block markup and records WPHX-314 block ownership as cross-domain
privacy export confirmation route records deterministic request confirmation state transition intent
privacy admin management route emits deterministic list-table rows and records WPHX-315/WPHX-316 ownership boundary

public_abi_policy.installed_wordpress_behavior_claimed: focused deterministic local route observations only

cross_domain_ownership.area: RSS block renderer and broader block package/runtime ownership
cross_domain_ownership.boundary: This gate records installed-style RSS block route output only; block registry, supports, interactivity, and generated public PHP ownership remain WPHX-314 work.

cross_domain_ownership.area: Admin screens, tools pages, list-table rendering, and admin bootstrap
cross_domain_ownership.boundary: This gate records deterministic privacy admin/list-table and widget/admin-adjacent route output only; full admin screen behavior remains WPHX-315 work.

cross_domain_ownership.area: Settings/options/tools state and database-backed management workflows
cross_domain_ownership.boundary: This gate records request confirmation/list-table intent without persistent database writes, options, user capabilities, nonces, or real tools-page state.

remaining_gaps.detail: Routes use deterministic local observations. Real post/comment queries, feed enclosures, user request posts/meta, capabilities, nonces, options, sidebars, and widget instances remain later installed-system work.
RSS block and privacy admin/list-table routes are cross-domain evidence only. Broader block package behavior, admin screen rendering, and management workflows remain under their owning domains.
Remote feed fetching, SimplePie network/cache behavior, and live oEmbed provider discovery are not executed in this route gate.
The gate compares copied oracle PHP package roots; generated original-path PHP replacement remains separate WPHX PHP adapter/compiler work.
